violations.text: Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (ice machine) were observed with an accumulation of black residue. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch.Unit taken out of service. Ice voluntarily disposed of. New Violation. Correct By: 06/05/2025

The door to the outside, located in the (front of store ), is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 06/10/2025

The non-food contact surfaces of the (cooking equipment and surrounding area ) have an accumulation of dust, food residue, grease buildup, and /or other debris. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 06/10/2025

The floors and walls throughout the facility(including walk in cooler) have an accumulation of soil residue, food debris, and/or grease buildup. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 06/10/2025
Management's plan for assessing, monitoring, and controlling foodborne disease hazards is inadequate. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 05/30/2025
Inspector observed bread with rodent gnaw marks. PIC voluntarily disposed of food product. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 05/27/2025

The presence of (rodents) is not controlled as evidenced by (droppings throughout back kitchen area and gnaw marks on bread ). The presence of insects, rodents, and other pests must be controlled by routinely inspecting the premises for evidence of pests, using acceptable methods to control pests, eliminating harborage conditions, and routinely inspecting incoming shipments of food and supplies. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 06/13/2025

The following non-food contact surfaces have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, debris, an grease buildup: 1.hot hold and surrounding area and cooking equipment 2.shelves under fry station. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 06/13/2025

The floors and walls throughout the facility(including walk in cooler) have an accumulation of soil residue and/or food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 05/27/2025

The following physical facilities observed in poor repair: 1.hole in wall behind water heater 2.hole in wall near fryers in kitchen 3.gap/space between walls in 3 bay sink and water heater area The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 06/13/2025
Management's plan for assessing, monitoring, and controlling foodborne disease hazards is inadequate. New Violation. Correct By: 05/27/2025
Inspector observed bread with rodent gnaw marks and droppings. PIC Voluntarily disposed of food product. New Violation. Correct By: 05/27/2025

The presence of (rodents ) is not controlled as evidenced by (gnaw marks and droppings throughout the facility ). The presence of insects, rodents, and other pests must be controlled by routinely inspecting the premises for evidence of pests, using acceptable methods to control pests, eliminating harborage conditions, and routinely inspecting incoming shipments of food and supplies. New Violation. Correct By: 05/27/2025

The door to the outside, located in the front of store ), is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 06/10/2025
(Ice machine) located in the (back kitchen ) area was not in good repair.Observed a crack in cover New Violation. Correct By: 06/10/2025

The following non-food contact surfaces have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris: 1,prep counter shelves 2.hot hold equipment and surrounding area 3.fans in walk in cooler 4.ceiling and ceiling vents New Violation. Correct By: 06/10/2025

The floors and walls throughout the facility (including the walk in cooler)have an accumulation of soil residue, food debris, and/or grease buildup. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 06/10/2025

The following physical facilities observed in poor repair: 1 gap under door seal in back kitchen area. 2.walls near mop sink area are detaching from surface. 3.hole in wall behind water heater. 4.gap/space between the walls and floors in 3 bay sink and water heater area. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 06/10/2025
Handwashing signage was lacking in all restrooms. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 03/25/2024

The following equipment was not in good repair: 1.ice machine cover is cracked and/or missing plastic; exposing insulation. 2.warped slicer blades. 3.door to walk in cooler tight fitting. Per conversation with PIC, work orders were generated for equipment. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 04/04/2024
The non-food contact surfaces of the shelves throughout kitchen have an accumulation of dust, food residue, debris and/or grease. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 04/08/2024
The plumbing to the 3 bay sink is in poor repair. Leak observed, Repeat Violation. Correct By: 04/08/2024
The floors in the walk in cooler area is in poor repair(observed buckling). The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 04/08/2024

The floors throughout the kitchen, walk in cooler, walk in freezer, and floor drains near ice machine have an accumulation of soil residue and/or food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 04/08/2024

The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. New Violation. Correct By: 03/25/2024
Handwashing signage was lacking in all restrooms. New Violation. Correct By: 03/25/2024

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (vegetable slicer) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. New Violation. Correct By: 03/25/2024

Dairy products was observed held at (63) degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Product voluntarily disposed. New Violation. Correct By: 03/25/2024

The presence of fruit flies is not controlled as evidenced by (live activity). The presence of insects, rodents, and other pests must be controlled by routinely inspecting the premises for evidence of pests, using acceptable methods to control pests, eliminating harborage conditions, and routinely inspecting incoming shipments of food and supplies. New Violation. Correct By: 03/29/2024
Onions were observed stored on the floor in the walk in cooler. Food must be stored at least 6 inches above the floor. New Violation. Correct By: 03/25/2024

The following equipment was not in good repair: 1.ice machine cover is cracked and/or missing plastic; exposing insulation. 2.warped slicer blades. 3.door to walk in cooler tight fitting. 4.lowboy was holding inadequate ambient temperatures. New Violation. Correct By: 04/08/2024
The non-food contact surfaces of the shelves throughout the kitchen have an accumulation of dust, food residue, debris, and/or grease. New Violation. Correct By: 03/25/2024
The plumbing to the 3 bay sink is in poor repair. Leak observed. New Violation. Correct By: 03/29/2024

The floors and walls throughout the kitchen, walk in cooler, walk in freezer, and floor drains near ice machine have an accumulation of soil residue and/or food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 03/25/2024
The floors in the walk in cooler area is in poor repair(inspector observed buckling). The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 04/08/2024
